lessons.title: The Billion Dollar Mistake 💸
lessons.description: Understand what Null is, and why it causes so many apps to crash.

lessons.title: Nullable Variables (?) ❓
lessons.description: Learn how to safely tell Dart that a box might be empty.

lessons.title: The Assertion Operator (!) ⚠️
lessons.description: Force Dart to trust you when you KNOW a box isn't empty.

lessons.title: Null-Aware Operators (??) 🛡️
lessons.description: Provide a default backup plan just in case a variable is missing.
